rag_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes; implementation bindings in implementation scopes.
Do not encode AADL properties (e.g., Dispatch_Protocol) directly as AGREE variables unless they are exposed as ports or constants.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts reside within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Align helper declaration types with expression types (bool, int, real).
Avoid range comparisons or 0/1 equality over Boolean, enumeration-like, or opaque data ports unless a numeric scalar representation exists.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope.
anti_patterns: Do not attempt to use AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions without corresponding ports or constants.
Avoid generating clauses with unresolved references to AADL properties.
irrelevant_topics: AADL structural extraction details (component types, implementations, features, connections, properties, owners)
